About Me

Who I am

I'm Aman Pradhan, a 3rd-year Computer Science undergraduate at SOA University, Bhubaneswar. I have a deep interest in software engineering, systems design, and building things from scratch. I thrive at the intersection of logic and creativity — whether it's architecting a backend service or debugging a gnarly algorithm.

Outside of coursework, I actively contribute to open-source projects, participate in competitive programming, and take on freelance development work to sharpen my skills in real-world environments.

I'm currently looking for internship opportunities where I can contribute meaningfully and grow alongside a strong engineering team.

Things I've built

Web Application · 2025
Road Safety Management System

A web-based application designed to promote road safety by providing users with essential traffic rules, safety guidelines, emergency contact information, and road awareness resources. Allows users to report road hazards or accidents, encouraging responsible road usage and improving public safety.

Python Django HTML CSS JavaScript SQLite
